## Summary

Follow-up to PR #670. This updates the Storygate creator apply page so it matches the current manuscript-first public scope.

## Changes

- Replaces broad project wording with manuscript project wording.
- Removes screen/adaptation package sections from the creator preparation page.
- Replaces project-type cards with manuscript-focused categories.
- Clarifies Gate 2 applies to full-manuscript readiness rather than excerpts.
- Updates the RevisionGrade preparation path to reference short-form, long-form, and multi-layer evaluation modes.
- Updates Agent Readiness wording to query letter, synopsis, query pitch, comparables, and author bio.
- Removes guarantee language tied to unsupported downstream media outcomes.

## Notes

No backend logic, database, routes, or auth behavior changed. This is public copy and page-structure cleanup only.
